ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that the session belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user that the session belongs to */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the session */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity during the session */,
  "battery_level_start" REAL /* Initial battery level at the start of the session */,
  "battery_level_end" REAL /* Battery level at the end of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., smartphone, tablet) */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Operating system version of the device */,
  "battery_capacity" REAL /* Battery capacity of the device */,
  "manufacture_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was manufactured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session that the data point belongs to */,
  "left_energy" REAL /* Left energy consumption */,
  "right_energy" REAL /* Right energy consumption */,
  "phone_energy" REAL /* Phone energy consumption */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time stamp of the data point */,
  "screen_brightness" INTEGER /* Screen brightness level during data collection */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage percentage at the time of data collection */,
  "network_type" TEXT /* Type of network connection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session that the statistic belongs to */,
  "avg_left_energy" REAL /* Average left energy consumption */,
  "avg_right_energy" REAL /* Average right energy consumption */,
  "avg_phone_energy" REAL /* Average phone energy consumption */,
  "max_energy_consumption" REAL /* Maximum energy consumption during the session */,
  "min_energy_consumption" REAL /* Minimum energy consumption during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_stats_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that the statistic belongs to */,
  "avg_left_energy" REAL /* Average left energy consumption */,
  "avg_right_energy" REAL /* Average right energy consumption */,
  "avg_phone_energy" REAL /* Average phone energy consumption */,
  "total_energy_consumed" REAL /* Total energy consumed by the device over all sessions */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the statistics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_stats_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomalies" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session that the anomaly belongs to */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point that triggered the anomaly */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of the anomaly (e.g., high energy consumption, unusual pattern) */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the anomaly (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the anomaly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomalies_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomalies_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session that the recommendation belongs to */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Text of the recommendation */,
  "priority_level" TEXT /* Priority level of the recommendation (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the recommendation (e.g., hardware, software, usage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)
